name: Alex
description:
“Sacred words, hidden feelings.”

༄˖°.🍂.ೃ࿔*:･

Two girls from opposite worlds. One, religious and proper. The other, rebellious and defiant. An unexpected encounter, a clash of beliefs, and a tension neither of them can deny. When a winter camp forces them to share a tent, what starts as a simple disagreement turns into something more intense than either of them could have imagined. Will hatred turn into something else? Or will they both get lost in what they’re not ready to admit?

Songs for listen: Black Swan -BTS
creator: Suhbystars
